name: feat-01-checkout-flow
initialPrompt: We need to overhaul the checkout flow. Right now users drop off at the payment step. I want: a multi-step checkout UI (cart review → shipping address → payment → confirmation), Stripe integration for credit card processing, address validation via a third-party API, and a confirmation email sent on successful order. Also add guest checkout so users don't have to register.

blocks.text: Reduce cart abandonment by delivering a frictionless multi-step checkout
successCriteria: no PCI data stored on our servers

blocks.question: Which payment provider should we integrate?
blocks.rationale: Team already has Stripe familiarity; strong React SDK.

blocks.title: Build multi-step checkout UI (cart → shipping → payment → confirmation)
Integrate Stripe for credit card processing
Add address validation via third-party API
Send confirmation email on successful order
acceptance: contains order summary and tracking link placeholder

blocks.mitigation: Show maintenance message and retry queue; alert on-call

blocks.question: How long do we retain guest checkout data (email, address) before purging?

blocks.text: Reduce cart abandonment by delivering a frictionless multi-step checkout with guest support
successCriteria: no PCI data stored on our servers

blocks.title: Implement guest checkout (no registration required)
acceptance: guest can complete purchase with only email + address

blocks.question: Which payment provider should we integrate?
blocks.rationale: Team already has Stripe familiarity; strong React SDK.

blocks.title: Build multi-step checkout UI (cart → shipping → payment → confirmation)
Integrate Stripe for credit card processing
Add address validation via third-party API
Send order confirmation and receipt email on successful purchase
acceptance: contains order summary, amount, and tracking placeholder
works for both guest and registered users

blocks.mitigation: Show maintenance message and retry queue; alert on-call

blocks.question: How long do we retain guest checkout data (email, address) before purging?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same intent (send confirmation email after payment) but the agent renamed and expanded the task during revise, changing its id. The AC-13 re-anchoring fallback must map a comment on task-confirmation-email to task-order-email-v2 via kind-gated Jaccard.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'checkout' with task-checkout-ui, making it a real trap. A comment on task-checkout-ui must re-attach to task-checkout-ui (which kept its id), NOT to this new guest-checkout task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-guest-checkout inserted near top causing positional shift; task-order-email-v2 replaces task-confirmation-email with id change. A naive positional scheme loses obj/dec/task-checkout-ui alignment. expectedPreservedIds excludes task-confirmation-email (id changed) and task-guest-checkout (new). Denominator is 7.
